What We Offer

Curated
Experiences

Every experience is meticulously crafted by our world-class concierge team — tailored to your desires, delivered without compromise. From the open seas to the open road, OSO handles every detail.

01

Private Yacht Charters

From intimate sailboats to 200ft mega-yachts, we connect you with the finest vessels across the Mediterranean, Caribbean, and beyond. Full crew, gourmet catering, and custom itineraries included.

Charter Now →
02

Exotic Car Rentals

Command the streets in a Lamborghini, Ferrari, Rolls-Royce, or Bugatti. Our exotic fleet spans 30+ cities worldwide. Door-to-door delivery, no hidden fees, white-glove service always.

View Fleet →
03

Nightclub & Events

Reserved tables at the world's most exclusive clubs — LIV Miami, Hakkasan Vegas, Pacha Ibiza, Cavalli Club Dubai. VIP entry, bottle service, and priority access guaranteed.

Get Access →
04

Private Villas

Extraordinary residences in the world's most desirable locales — Santorini cliffside estates, Bali jungle retreats, Maldives overwater mansions, and Tuscan countryside palaces.

Discover Villas →

Experiences

Miami Fleet

Exotic &
Luxury Car Rentals

Door-to-door delivery across Miami, South Beach, and Fort Lauderdale. Every vehicle is privately owned, immaculately maintained, and ready when you are — 24/7 concierge included.

Lamborghini
Lamborghini

Aventador

The Lamborghini Aventador LP 740-4 S Roadster is the final naturally-aspirated V12 Lamborghini — a 6.5L V12 producing 740 horsepower, all-wheel drive, and a 0-60 mph time under 3 seconds. The open-top roadster combines Italian supercar theater with the unmistakable V12 soundtrack that made Lamborghini legendary.

2023Year
769 HPPower
RoadsterBody
Inquire Now
Ferrari
Ferrari

F8 Spider

The Ferrari F8 Spider is powered by a 3.9L twin-turbo V8 producing 710 horsepower — the most powerful V8 Ferrari has ever built. The retractable hardtop opens in 14 seconds, delivering open-top driving with a 0-60 mph time of 2.9 seconds. Pure Ferrari performance with the sun on your shoulders.

2022Year
710 HPPower
SpiderBody
Inquire Now
Rolls-Royce
Rolls-Royce

Cullinan

The Rolls-Royce Cullinan is the pinnacle of luxury SUVs — named after the largest diamond ever discovered. A 6.75L twin-turbo V12 delivers 563 horsepower through an effortlessly quiet cabin. All-wheel drive, all-wheel steering, and the signature Magic Carpet Ride suspension make it the most refined SUV money can rent.

2024Year
563 HPPower
SUVBody

Rolls-Royce
Rolls-Royce

Dawn

The Rolls-Royce Dawn is the most seductive four-seat convertible ever built — a 6.6L twin-turbo V12 with 563 horsepower and a six-layer cloth soft top that retracts in near silence. Described by Rolls-Royce as 'the sexiest Rolls ever,' the Dawn is the ultimate Miami drop-top grand tourer.

2022Year
563 HPPower
ConvertibleBody

Rolls-Royce
Rolls-Royce

Wraith

The Rolls-Royce Wraith is the most powerful Rolls-Royce ever — a 6.6L twin-turbo V12 producing 624 horsepower through a satellite-aided transmission that reads the road ahead to pre-select the correct gear. Rear-hinged coach doors and a starlight headliner complete the ultimate grand touring experience.

624 HPPower

Mercedes-Benz

GLS Maybach

The Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600 is Mercedes-Benz's flagship luxury SUV — a 4.0L twin-turbo V8 paired with an EQ Boost starter-alternator delivers 550 horsepower with seamless grace. Executive rear seating with massaging recliners, 23-inch Maybach wheels, and first-class amenities make the Maybach GLS travel like no other SUV.

Rolls-Royce

Ghost

The Rolls-Royce Ghost is understated power perfected — a 6.75L twin-turbo V12 producing 563 horsepower delivered through Planar Suspension and Magic Carpet Ride technology. For those who prefer their luxury quiet, the Ghost is the definitive chauffeur-driven or owner-driven super-sedan.

Huracán Spyder

The Lamborghini Huracán EVO Spyder pairs a naturally-aspirated 5.2L V10 producing 602 horsepower with a drop-top roadster design. All-wheel drive with rear-wheel torque vectoring, a 0-60 mph sprint of 3.1 seconds, and that unmistakable V10 shriek. Miami's ultimate open-air supercar.

2024 Urus S

The 2024 Lamborghini Urus S is the most powerful Urus in the standard lineup — a 4.0L twin-turbo V8 delivering 657 horsepower with launch control, all-wheel drive, and active torque vectoring. 0-60 mph in 3.3 seconds. The Urus redefines what a luxury SUV can be.

Concierge Access
The Collection

Our Most
Exclusive Residences

OSO Hospitality curates the world's most exceptional residences — from oceanfront penthouses on the Miami coastline to clifftop villas overlooking the Mediterranean. Each property is personally vetted for its location, privacy, architectural distinction, and seamless service. Whether it's a private rooftop pool in South Beach, a cliffside villa in Mykonos, or a beachfront estate in Saint-Barths, every residence in our collection is selected to define what luxury living truly means.

From Miami to Monaco, St. Tropez to the Maldives — wherever in the world you wish to stay, our concierge team secures access to residences not available on the open market.

Schedule a Private Tour

Cannes · Côte d'Azur

Cannes
Signature Events

From iconic film premieres to yacht-side soirées, OSO secures access to the most coveted moments on the French Riviera.

May · Annual

Cannes Film Festival

The Cannes Film Festival takes place each May in Cannes, bringing together the world of cinema, luxury, and culture on the French Riviera. Known for red carpet premieres, yacht events, exclusive parties, and prestigious awards, the festival attracts global filmmakers, celebrities, and tastemakers for nearly two weeks of iconic experiences.

Inquire Access
← Back to Home
Monaco · Côte d'Azur

Monaco
Signature Events

From the world's most prestigious race to legendary casino nights and waterfront galas, OSO secures access to Monaco's most coveted experiences.

May · Annual

F1 Monaco Grand Prix

Monaco Grand Prix is the crown jewel of Formula 1 — where elite racing meets luxury on the streets of Monte Carlo. Set against yachts, casinos, and the Mediterranean, it's one of the most prestigious and difficult races in motorsport, known as much for glamour and celebrity as for speed. During race week, Formula One World Championship transforms Monaco into a global spectacle of sport, nightlife, and high society.

Inquire Access
← Back to Home
Miami Nightlife

Exclusive
Nightlife Access

OSO secures VIP tables, personal hosts, and skip-the-line entry at Miami's most iconic clubs. Every night is curated around your style.

VIP Table Reservations
Best locations guaranteed
Skip-the-Line Entry
No waiting, ever
Personal Host All Night
Dedicated concierge on-site
24/7 Support
Last-minute changes covered
Wed – Sun

LIV

Miami's most iconic mega-club — celebrity sightings, high-energy hip-hop and EDM, and a flashy, high-end vibe. Guys can buy tickets or tables; girls often get on guestlists. Everyone must dress to impress.

Reserve Table
Fri – Sat

Club Space

Miami's legendary after-hours spot, famous for sunrise sets, underground house and techno, and an open-air Terrace. No strict dress code — think rave over luxury. Both guys and girls can buy tickets; tables available but not required.

Reserve Table
Wed – Sun

E11EVEN

A 24/7 ultraclub with aerial shows, big-name DJs and rappers, and nonstop energy 'til sunrise. Both guys and girls can buy tickets or tables — guys usually need a table on weekends. Dress code is upscale nightclub — think sexy and stylish.

Reserve Table
Thu – Sat

Mila Lounge

A luxe, multi-sensory subterranean hotspot in Miami Beach, blending earthy African-inspired design with a glamorous vibe and deep-house beats. Dress code is upscale-chic — business casual to cocktail attire. Guys typically need to book a table or bottle service; guestlist isn't standard.

Reserve Table
Thu – Sat

Faena Saxony Bar

A gilded-age speakeasy-style lounge at Faena Hotel, with cozy seating, live DJs, and refined craft cocktails in an intimate, elegant setting. Dress code is upscale-chic — think tailored attire, no casual sandals. Guys typically need a table reservation.

Reserve Table
Thu – Sun

Casa Neos Lounge

Casa Neos is a waterfront hotspot in Miami that blends Mediterranean-inspired dining with a high-end nightlife atmosphere. By day it offers refined, scenic dining, while at night it transforms into a vibrant social scene with music, cocktails, and an upscale crowd. It's a go-to destination for a luxury, experience-driven night out.

Reserve Table
Thu – Sat

Gekko Lounge

A high-end, velvet-draped lounge in Brickell by Bad Bunny and David Grutman, known for its elite crowd, DJ sets, and luxury Japanese vibes. Girls often get in on guestlist; guys book tables for entry. Dress code is upscale and stylish.

Reserve Table
Thu – Sat

Mary Lou's

Mary Lou's is an intimate, high-energy lounge in Miami known for its chic crowd and late-night atmosphere. The space blends sultry lighting, curated music, and crafted cocktails to create a stylish, members-only feel without the formality. It's a go-to spot for those looking to transition from dinner into a more exclusive, social nightlife experience.

Reserve Table
Fri – Sun

Daer

An upscale, Vegas-style nightclub at the Seminole Hard Rock Guitar Hotel, with massive LED walls, top DJs, and a luxury poolside dayclub vibe. Girls can often get on the guestlist; guys must book a table or buy tickets. Dress code is trendy and upscale.

Reserve Table
Mon, Fri – Sat

Vendôme

A stylish South Beach club with Parisian-inspired decor, hip-hop and house music, and a fashionable international crowd. Girls often get in on guestlist with free drinks early; guys always need a table. Dress code is upscale and enforced.

Reserve Table
Tue, Thu, Sun

Mona Club

A luxe South Beach venue featuring da Vinci-inspired decor, live rapper sets, and a high-energy hip-hop and Latin music mix. Girls often get on guestlist; guys enter through table reservations. Dress code is upscale and trendy.

Reserve Table
Wed, Fri – Sat

Bacara

An upscale, high-energy Miami Beach nightclub known for late nights, top DJs, and a sleek, sexy crowd. Girls can get in through guestlist; guys need to book a table — no guestlist or tickets available for men. Dress code is stylish and enforced.

Reserve Table
Tue, Fri – Sat

Mr. Jones

A sleek South Beach hotspot spinning all hip-hop, backed by VIP energy, dancers, and intimate luxury vibes. Girls can always get on the guestlist; guys need to reserve a table or bottle service nightly. Dress code is upscale and refined.

Reserve Table
Fri – Sat

Palm Tree Club

A tropical waterfront venue by Kygo's Palm Tree Crew, blending sunset live-music sets and late-night dance parties with big-name DJs. Tickets and tables are required for DJ events for both guys and girls. Typically starts at 4:00 PM on Fridays and Saturdays.

Reserve Table
Thu – Sun

Casa Neos

Casa Neos is a waterfront hotspot in Miami that blends Mediterranean-inspired dining with a high-end nightlife atmosphere. By day it offers refined, scenic dining, while at night it transforms into a vibrant social scene with music, cocktails, and an upscale crowd. It's a go-to destination for a luxury, experience-driven night out.

Reserve Table
Fri – Sun

Daer

An upscale, Vegas-style nightclub at the Seminole Hard Rock Guitar Hotel, with massive LED walls, top DJs, and a luxury poolside dayclub vibe. Girls can often get on the guestlist; guys must book a table or buy tickets. Dress code is trendy and upscale.

Reserve Table
May · Annual

F1 Miami Grand Prix

Miami Grand Prix brings Formula 1 energy to Miami with world-class racing, luxury hospitality, celebrity parties, and nonstop nightlife. Set around the Hard Rock campus, it blends elite motorsport with the city's signature glamour, making race weekend as much a social spectacle as a sporting event. During F1 Miami, the entire city turns into a high-octane playground of speed, status, and exclusive experiences.

Inquire Access

How It Works

Effortless from
Start to Finish

01

Consultation

Speak with a dedicated concierge who takes time to understand your desires, budget, and every nuanced preference. Available 24/7 by phone, WhatsApp, or email.

02

Custom Proposal

Within hours, receive a tailored proposal with curated options — hand-selected vessels, vehicles, residences, and venues matched exactly to your vision.

03

White-Glove Booking

We handle every contract, deposit, and logistical detail. You simply confirm. Our team coordinates all vendors, transfers, and arrangements seamlessly.

04

Flawless Experience

Arrive to perfection. Your concierge remains reachable throughout. Any wish, any hour — we ensure every moment exceeds every expectation.

Client Stories

What Our
Clients Say

All Reviews

"The yacht OSO arranged in Ibiza was beyond anything I imagined. The crew, the route, the food — every single detail was perfect. I'll never book through anyone else."
